subject: [PATCH 1/1] mm/vmscan: reduce lru_lock contention via vmstat-derived scan-balance cost

2026-07-06.patch_summary: This patch reduces contention on the lru_lock by moving the accumulation of scan costs from the producer side to a read-side accumulator fed from per-LRU vmstat counters. The old approach involved multiple lock acquisitions, which was causing contention on memory-heavy workloads. The new approach uses explicit node_stat counters for reclaim-driven pageout submissions and rotations, and recomputes the cost signal in prepare_scan_control() lock-free of lru_lock. This change also improves the cost model across reclaim gaps by moving accumulation and decay to the reclaim side.
